license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.qnmdvc6
title: 3' Azide labelling with TdT
author: Benjamin Emert

steps_raw.instruction: Set up TdT reaction undetermined, 10x Terminal transferase buffer undetermined, 2.5mM CoCl2 undetermined, 400μM template oligo undetermined, 10mM N6(6-azido)hexyl-3'-dATP undetermined, recombinant TdT (20U/μL) undetermined, nuclease free water Probably useful to scale up reaction.
Incubate at 37ºC overnight. Undetermined, Incubate on thermal cycler Undetermined, thermal cycler lid temperature 12:00:00, incubate overnight

Add 1/10th volume sodium acetate and 3x volume ethanol to precipitate azide labelled oligo. undetermined, 3M sodium acetate undetermined, 200 proof ethanol If you want to get rid of excess N6-(6-azido)hexyl-3'-dATP, you may want to use 1/2 volume 7.5M ammonium acetate.
Place solution at -80ºC for 1 hour to precipitate. Fine to incubate at -20ºC or -80ºC for longer. Undetermined 01:00:00
Centrifuge for 10 minutes to precpitate 00:10:00, Centrifuge at 16,000 x g Undetermined
Remove supernatant. Careful not to disturb pellet.
Wash sample with 500 μL 70% ethanol undetermined, 70% ethanol
Centrifuge for 2-5 minutes. 00:02:00, Centrifuge at 16,000 x g
Remove supernatant. Careful not to disturb pellet.
Centrifuge for 1 minute to collect supernatant from the lid and walls. 00:01:00, Centrifuge at 16,000 x g
Remove supernatant then dry pellet under vacuum or ambient air.

Add 1.8 μL nuclease free water to dissolve dry pellet. Let sit at room temp for ≥20 minutes. undetermined, nuclease free water Undetermined, incubate at room temperature 00:20:00, incubate at room temperature. Adding 1.8 μL and assuming ~10% loss. Can be more precise and measure final concentration but beware of residual dATP.
Store azide modified oligo at -20ºC indefinitely. Undetermined
